description: §26.8.2 / §26.7 — a composing-family `@apply` (`.card { @apply ring-2 shadow-lg; }`) composes the ring AND the shadow via the §26.7 inline-fallback `var()` model exactly as two `class=` tokens would, and fires NOTHING from the E-APPLY-* family. Composing-family utilities are an explicit ✅ in the v1 scope.
rationale: §26.8.2 (✅ composing-family utilities) + §26.8.1: `ring-2` and `shadow-lg` each expand to their `--tw-*` setters AND the `var()` composing shorthand, so `@apply ring-2 shadow-lg` composes both into `.card` — the §26.7 model carries through `@apply` unchanged and partial application stays valid. No E-APPLY-* fires; `ring-2` / `shadow-lg` are recognized composing utilities (no W-TAILWIND-*); `.card` is an author-defined class (§26.5).
